text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The arXiv ID 2407.15261 resolves to a real paper titled "Pandora's Box Problem With Time Constraints" (not "Pandora's box problem over time"), authored by 7 people: Amanatidis, Berger, Ezra, Feldman, Fusco, Reiffenhäuser, and Tsikiridis. The cited title is incorrect and 3 of the 7 actual authors (Berger, Ezra, Feldman) are missing from the citation, indicating a partially fabricated reference.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.15261
